summary: Round-5 code-hygiene verification: All backend test files now load credentials and BASE_URL exclusively from environment via conftest.py + .env.test fixture. Ran full pytest suite (53 tests) — 53 passed in 36.85s. ESLint webpack compiles clean (Compiled successfully, no warnings in latest cycles).

verifications_performed.base_url_from_env_no_fallback: All 3 test files use `BASE_URL = os.environ['REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL'].rstrip('/')` — confirmed in test_csrf_cookie_auth.py:23, test_farmer_regression.py:12, test_lockout_password_reset.py:30
verifications_performed.conftest_loads_env_test: tests/conftest.py uses python-dotenv to load .env.test at conftest collection (before test modules import) — verified pytest collection succeeded with module-level BASE_URL constants
verifications_performed.env_test_contents: .env.test contains REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL + 6 credential vars (TEST_FARMER_EMAIL/PASSWORD, TEST_BUYER_EMAIL/PASSWORD, TEST_ADMIN_EMAIL/PASSWORD)
verifications_performed.pytest_collect_only: 53 tests collected in 0.12s, no collection errors
verifications_performed.test_creds_fixture_consumption: test_auth_me_farmer, test_invalid_login (farmer_regression), test_login_still_sets_kb_and_csrf, test_post_products_without_csrf_403_with_csrf_2xx (lockout_password_reset) all pass — confirms fixture parameter wiring is correct
verifications_performed.lockout_regression: TestBruteForceLockout (4 tests including progression_and_429) all passed
verifications_performed.csrf_cookie_regression: TestCsrfMiddleware + TestLoginCookies + TestAuthMe (cookie+CSRF flows) all passed
verifications_performed.eslint_webpack_clean: Latest frontend.out.log compile cycles all show 'Compiled successfully!' with no warnings between Compiling and Compiled lines (verified by touching src/App.js to force fresh compile)

critical_code_review_comments: All test code-hygiene goals met. conftest.py correctly uses load_dotenv at module-top so BASE_URL constants in test modules resolve correctly (pytest loads conftest.py before collecting test modules).

Minor observation (non-blocking): conftest.py uses pytest.skip() inside _required() helper, which means missing env vars cause test skip rather than hard failure — acceptable for local-dev convenience but CI should ensure env vars are always set or treat skip as failure.
Mocked APIs (per request): Razorpay payment confirmation remains MOCKED (not touched in this round).
test_credentials: Loaded from /app/backend/tests/.env.test via conftest fixture — farmer/buyer/admin @ kisanbaazar.in
seed_data_creation: None — tests create transient @example.com users for reset/lockout flows and clean up post-test
context_for_next_testing_agent: Round-5 verification complete. All 53 backend tests green, no hardcoded creds/URLs remain in tests, ESLint clean. Frontend not retested per request scope. Next iteration should focus on any new features the user requests; current state is fully regression-clean.
